vocab.example: Living near a construction site, I am constantly subjected to a high level of acoustic pollution.
The piercing shriek of the train's brakes at the nearby station often wakes me up at dawn.

vocab.meaning: tiếng trò chuyện xung quanh (tiếng rì rầm)
vocab.example: I actually find the ambient chatter in local coffee shops quite helpful for my productivity.

vocab.meaning: tiếng rung trầm (như tiếng động cơ máy móc)
vocab.example: There is a constant low-frequency thrum from the central air conditioning unit in my office building.

vocab.meaning: sự hỗn loạn của tiếng còi xe
vocab.example: During rush hour, the street below my window turns into a cacophony of horns and revving engines.

vocab.meaning: sự im lặng thanh bình (dùng để so sánh)
vocab.example: I cherish the serene silence of the early morning before the rest of the city begins to stir.

vocab.meaning: tiếng ồn ào om sòm, huyên náo
vocab.example: The neighbors' kids were making such a racket in the hallway that I couldn't hear my own phone call.
Occasionally, a low-flying aircraft will pass over, completely shattering the tranquility of the countryside.

vocab.meaning: quá tải thính giác (do quá nhiều tiếng ồn)
vocab.example: Spending all day in an open-plan office can lead to auditory overload by the time I get home.

vocab.meaning: tiếng ồn ào âm ỉ, không rõ rệt nhưng liên tục
vocab.example: Even with the windows closed, the stadium nearby creates a dull roar during big matches.
